code: import api,{firstSuccess}from'./api';export const userService={createUser:async user=>(await firstSuccess([()=>api.post('/api/users',user),()=>api.post('/users',user)])).data,getAllUsers:async()=>(await firstSuccess([()=>api.get('/api/users'),()=>api.get('/users')])).data,getUserById:async id=>(await firstSuccess([()=>api.get("/api/users/".concat(id)),()=>api.get("/users/".concat(id))])).data,updateUser:async(id,user)=>(await firstSuccess([()=>api.put("/api/users/".concat(id),user),()=>api.put("/users/".concat(id),user)])).data,deleteUser:async id=>(await firstSuccess([()=>api.delete("/api/users/".concat(id)),()=>api.delete("/users/".concat(id))])).data,searchByEmail:async email=>{const encoded=encodeURIComponent(email);return(await firstSuccess([()=>api.get("/api/users/search/email/".concat(encoded)),()=>api.get("/api/users/search?email=".concat(encoded)),()=>api.get("/users/search/email/".concat(encoded))])).data;},searchByName:async name=>{const encoded=encodeURIComponent(name);return(await firstSuccess([()=>api.get("/api/users/search/name/".concat(encoded)),()=>api.get("/api/users/search?name=".concat(encoded)),()=>api.get("/users/search/name/".concat(encoded))])).data;}};
